final:
module mux_4to1_8bit(
    input wire [7:0] in0,
    input wire [7:0] in1,
    input wire [7:0] in2,
    input wire [7:0] in3,
    input wire [1:0] sel,
    output wire [7:0] out
    );

wire mux_output = (sel == 2'b00) ? in0 :
             (sel == 2'b01) ? in1 :
             (sel == 2'b10) ? in2 :
                              in3;
assign out = mux_output;

endmodule
